query:
UPDATE generatedQuotations 
SET originalMaterialsCost = materialsCost,
    originalEquipmentCost = equipmentCost,
    originalOperationalCost = operationalCost
WHERE id != 30003;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 229SuzWWvyFWDS3.root --database 3no3SFbize3PiJiUNAXEf9 --execute UPDATE generatedQuotations 
SET originalMaterialsCost = materialsCost,
    originalEquipmentCost = equipmentCost,
    originalOperationalCost = operationalCost
WHERE id != 30003;
